methods.description: This method involves measuring the size of pollen grains from Aconitum gymnandrum using SEM micrographs and calculating their surface area. This is used to understand the morphological characteristics of the pollen.

steps.description: Using SEM micrographs with the scale bar as a reference, we measured the diameter (D) of round pollen and the long axis (a) and short axis (b) of the fusiform pollen from mixed anthers sampled from different flowers and fixed in FAA.
steps.searchable_summary: measure pollen dimensions using SEM micrographs
outputs: long and short axes of fusiform pollen

steps.description: We calculated the size of round and fusiform pollen grains based on the surface area formula for a circle (1/4 × 3.14 × D^2) and ellipse (1/4 × 3.14 × a × b), respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate pollen surface area using geometric formulas
inputs: long and short axes of fusiform pollen
